literal: bridle of ammah, bridle of a cubit, bridle of the mother
origin: from h4964 and h0520 with the art. interposed; bit of the metropolis
notes: the exact meaning is unknown, but according to the parallel passage in 1 chronicles 18:1, this is a reference to gath. there we read, "gath and her towns," suggesting that gath was considered the mother city.
